description_long: This is a double-sided, freestanding blackboard with a dark wooden frame and two rectangular writing surfaces mounted parallel to each other. The frame features cylindrical posts with decorative end caps and horizontal supports, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. Each side of the blackboard displays chalk markings, including mathematical symbols and a simple drawing, indicating its use for educational or instructional purposes. The writing surfaces are matte black, contrasting with the rich reddish-brown wood of the frame. The structure is supported by four legs, each capped for stability, and the boards are held in place by visible side knobs or fasteners. The overall design suggests portability and suitability for outdoor or indoor urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or community spaces.
description: A double-sided, freestanding blackboard with a dark wooden frame and chalk-marked writing surfaces, supported by four sturdy legs and decorative end caps.
description_view_0: Front and rear views show both writing surfaces with chalk markings, framed by dark wood and supported by four legs.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blackboards and the cylindrical frame structure, highlighting the parallel arrangement of the boards.
description_view_2: Reverse front and rear views display the opposite sides of the writing surfaces, with visible chalk marks and the same robust wooden frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the slim profile and the parallel mounting of the two boards within the frame.
attribute_frame_design: thick dark wooden frame with cylindrical posts, decorative end caps, and horizontal supports
